hero.title: Transformative Peace
hero.subtitle: We work with community leaders, families, and policy makers to create inclusive peace processes.

features.title: Policy & Research
features.description: Transformative Peace pursues a multidisciplinary approach to conflict resolution, post-conflict reconciliation, and peacebuilding.

features.title: Program Design, Monitoring & Evaluation
features.description: We develop innovative programming, progressive education initiatives, and strategic partnerships.

features.title: Capacity Building Workshops & Training
features.description: We help communities understand their role in peacebuilding to affect change.

secondarySection.title: Dedicated to making a difference
secondarySection.description: Led by our founder, Dr. Houda Abadi, the Transformative Peace team is committed to helping communities understand the role they play in peacebuilding.
